name: Котыха
short_description: Kotiha is a visual novel parody. This is laughter, this is falsehood, this is pain, this is life.
detailed_description:
Kotihais a linear visual novel parody, a mirror of life in the CIS, filled with the same humor and the same everyday life. This satirical satire will make someone smile, and will make someone laugh, but in the end, it will not leave you indifferent.

There are no abstruse puzzles in the game.

Only pain and laughter in its purest form, through the eyes of the poor cashier of the local Chetyorochka - an ordinary worker Zhenya. And Uncle Zhora. And Kotykha. And what in the end?

There is no evil in the game.

This is an atmospheric wasteland from a comedy of reality, where everything bad is as obvious as possible, but also as contradictory to good as possible. No gray morality. Only life - only a game.
